videos.title: The Pinnacle of Modern Affinity  Much Abrew
videos.description:
What crazy things can Pinnacle Emissary do in Modern Affinity? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/much-abrew-pinnacle-affinity-modern
